author: Ethan Ning
name: SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 + Score-First TTT (4 epochs) + Tuned MLP WD
technique_summary: SP8192 + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence (L3-5) + Parallel Residuals (L7+) + QK-Gain 5.25 (bifurcated) + Per-head Attn Output Gate + XSA on all 11 layers + EMA 0.9965 + Split MLP WD (mlp 0.115 / attn 0.095) + Score-First TTT (SGD 4 epochs/chunk) + GPTQ SDClip int6 (matrix) / int8 (embed) + Brotli-11 byte-shuffle

attribution.this_record_delta: TTT epochs 3 -> 4, split MLP weight decay (mlp 0.115 / attn 0.095); all other components inherited from @bigbag's stack
